---
title: "Vault"
page-layout: article
---

# Vault

## Description

Career research platform with employer profiles, industry guides, rankings, interview advice, and job search resources. Supports career exploration and labor market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Workforce & Career Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Workforce & Career Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Current students, faculty, and staff can log in to Vault with their NetID.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.firsthand.co/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
